CREATE TABLE test_data1 (x Float64, y Float64);
CREATE TABLE test_data2 (val1 Float64, val2 Float64);
WITH (SELECT number FROM numbers(50) WHERE number > 0) AS filtered_numbers SELECT rankCorr((SELECT number FROM numbers(50)), filtered_numbers);
CREATE TABLE values_table (a Float64, b Float64);
SELECT rankCorr(number, (SELECT max(number) FROM numbers(100))) FROM numbers(100);
SELECT rankCorr(ARRAY(SELECT number FROM numbers(100)), ARRAY(SELECT number % 10 FROM numbers(100)));
CREATE TABLE complex_table (key1 UInt32, key2 UInt32, value1 Float64, value2 Float64);
SELECT rankCorr(value1, value2) FROM complex_table GROUP BY key1;
SELECT rankCorr(number, number + 1) FROM numbers(100) WHERE number % 2 = 0;
SELECT rankCorr(x, y) FROM (SELECT number AS x FROM numbers(50)) AS A JOIN (SELECT number AS y FROM numbers(50)) AS B ON A.x < B.y;
